mapper.select: SELECT CART_NUM , BOOK_TITLE , BOOK_PRICE , CART_CNT , CART_DATE , UPLOAD_FILE_NAME FROM SHOP_CART C INNER JOIN SHOP_BOOK B ON C.BOOK_NUM = B.BOOK_NUM INNER JOIN BOOK_IMG I ON I.BOOK_NUM = B.BOOK_NUM WHERE B.BOOK_NUM = I.BOOK_NUM AND MEM_EMAIL = #{memEmail} AND IS_MAIN = 'Y' ORDER BY CART_DATE DESC
